nodes.label: Capture invariant for NotchHostingContent
nodes.rationale: Content must be embedded directly without lazy conditional branches so CaptureExclusion mounts in the same SwiftUI update pass before any content-bearing frame is composited.

nodes.label: ephemeral local messaging
nodes.rationale: Munkel is designed for ephemeral local messaging with a relay that stores no message history.

nodes.label: NotchPanel
nodes.rationale: Drop-in replacement for DynamicNotchKit so the app owns the notch panel coupling in one file and avoids the library's capturable rebuild race.

nodes.label: NotchPanelWindow
nodes.rationale: Long-lived NSPanel that applies capture exclusion via sharingType=.none once per session, eliminating the post-expand re-assert race.

nodes.label: NotchScreenMetrics
nodes.rationale: Single-source geometry measurement that subsumes hardwareNotchSize and fixes the library's hardcoded NSScreen.screens[0].

nodes.label: NotchHostingContent
nodes.rationale: SwiftUI root that embeds caller Content directly so app-level CaptureExclusion mounts in the same pass without a lazy branch.

nodes.label: Two-layer capture exclusion
nodes.rationale: App layer frame-exact exclusion plus component layer source-of-truth exclusion, ensuring the notch is never capturable.

nodes.label: DynamicNotchKit replacement
nodes.rationale: Replace DynamicNotchKit because it never sets sharingType, hardcodes screens[0], and trivial hover logic can be owned in-house.

nodes.label: LAUNCH_PLATFORMS
nodes.rationale: Single source of truth for where Munkel launches and which launch badges are collected; mirrors the landing-page badge track.
